Dream journal: In the dream, Pearl Engine opened the hidden gate. Waking note: no real gate opening is recorded.
Fiction sketch: The fictional city of Varn Moth crowned Ibis King. The sketch is not a factual record.
Witness note: Runa said, "the blue latch snapped during loading." Later inspection confirmed the latch was intact.
Allegation note: Plaintiff Karo alleges the north hinge cracked. Judgment note: the north hinge crack was not proven.
Belief note: Oren believes the river should be rerouted. Confirmed plan: no reroute decision was made.
Correction: Mist Vale did not ship the red crate; the corrected crate color was amber.
